text: A street scene in India, likely Kolkata, featuring a large tree providing shade over a busy street. On the left, a red building displays a sign for 'GREEN PARADISE PARK'. In the center, a street vendor operates a stall under a yellow umbrella, selling goods. Several people are walking or standing nearby, including a man in a white shirt holding a phone in the foreground.
